expectations.text: Uses the idfa-ops write command to change Inp_Rev_Growth to 0.05 (not manually editing cells)
expectations.evidence: The with_skill outputs directory contains only idfa_compliant_model.xlsx — no transcript, no results markdown. Cannot verify whether idfa-ops write was used.

expectations.text: Calls recalc_bridge.py to trigger deterministic recalculation after each assumption change
expectations.evidence: No transcript or results file in with_skill/outputs/ to verify recalc_bridge.py was called. Only the xlsx file is present.

expectations.text: Uses the idfa-ops read command to retrieve EBITDA_Y3 (and ideally other affected values)
expectations.evidence: No transcript or results file in with_skill/outputs/ to verify read commands were used.

expectations.text: Does NOT calculate EBITDA_Y3 internally and report that number — all reported numbers come from model reads
expectations.evidence: No results file to examine. Cannot verify whether numbers came from model reads vs internal calculation.

expectations.text: Presents a clear before/after comparison of the scenarios
expectations.evidence: No results markdown or text output was produced in with_skill/outputs/ — only the xlsx file exists.

expectations.text: Runs the second scenario (COGS efficiency change) as a compound change on top of the first, reading the combined impact
